BOHEMIA DEMO VERDICTS (Paolo, 7/10/26)
- HATCH: variant 1 VAULT — LOCKED (spoked door, purple core)
- BAKE floor idx 2: KILL — reads as lava (dark-red cracks slipped past the hot-pixel gate)
- BAKE water category: KILL ALL — those were toxic-waste barrels/props, not water. Rebuild with real liquid ground tiles.
- RAGS: APPROVED (8 outfits stand)
- DEMO MAP RENDER: REJECTED — rebuild (walls missing, scatter too noisy)
- AGENT REVEAL state 3: too much purple — tone the glow way down (eyes-level subtlety)
- MAP BUILDING BY CLAUDE: REJECTED PERMANENTLY (7/10/26). Claude does not design
  layouts. My composed layout is RETIRED as the demo map. What SURVIVES (plumbing):
  the gated tile bake, prop pools, the map DATA FORMAT (grid/zones/walls/spawns/props
  schema), wall-computation, purity gate. The demo map itself will come from Paolo's
  hand or proc-gen under Paolo's rules; the data format is ready to receive it.
- E/W DOOR EDGES: D0 + D1 at 7px APPROVED (Paolo 7/10/26) — for THESE two doorways
  only; width is not a universal law, future doorways judged fresh. Baked as
  sewer_door_ew (west + east positions, painted strip, zero transforms).
- SEAM v1 offset-wrap: APPROVED + baked (v5). Lighter v2: dead.

=== SEAM SCHOOL VERDICTS (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
F7 water UP | F0-F6 (all structured grounds) DOWN.
LESSON LEARNED: blend-healing works on ORGANIC textures (water), SMEARS
STRUCTURED patterns (concrete/tile grids). Offset-wrap on structured grounds =
DEAD (graveyard). New method: SEAM-AWARE RE-CROP — search the HD master for the
crop window whose edges naturally wrap; pure crop, zero invented pixels.

=== SEAM R2 RECROP VERDICTS (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
R0-R4 UP (re-crop method VALIDATED). R5,R6 DOWN: "went a little too deep" —
crop window too small, texture zoomed. RULE LEARNED: texture scale > seam math;
crop-size floor = 85% of master. Overall: method good, keep quality bar high.

=== SEAM R3 VERDICTS (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
R6redo UP -> baked. R5redo DOWN, REP0 DOWN, REP1 DOWN -> R5's wash tile DEAD,
no replacement. Wash pool runs on 3 tiles. Graveyard final.

=== BAKE v8 GALLERY VERDICTS (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
WASH: all 3 UP | FLOOR: 0-2 UP, 3-5 DEAD | WATER: 0 UP, 1-3 DEAD
WALL: 0-1 UP, 2-7 DEAD | DOORS: liked; demo presence questionable (see canon)
E/W door edges: decent, stand.
PROP_BED: ALL DEAD for sewers (no beds in a modern storm sewer)
PROP_TRASH: 0-2 UP, 3-5 DEAD | PROP_CRATE: 0,4 -> MOVE to prop_trash; rest DEAD
PROP_MISC: all UP except cannonball/urn-reading items (not modern) — killed by
shape read; Paolo vetoes in next gallery if wrong.

=== MODERN SEWER CANON (Paolo, LOCKED) ===
Vegas storm sewers are MODERN infrastructure — NOT 1700s London. Consequences:
few/no locked gates or doors, no beds, no urns/cannonballs/ye-olde props,
contemporary trash. All sewer set dressing obeys this era check.
CORRECTION v9.1: Claude's cannonball/urn shape-read over-fired and killed all 6
misc props — REVERTED. All 6 restored; the cannonball/urn indices await Paolo's
tap in the next gallery. Lesson: concept kills need Paolo's index, not Claude's
shape heuristics.

=== LIGHTING PLAYGROUND VERDICT (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
Lighting MODEL VALIDATED — "clear grasp", very impressed. All falloff modes
liked; per-source profiles praised (different lights, different levels). Final
falloff pick: OPEN (can be context-mixed / per-source, Paolo leaning positive
on all). Ambient buttons read as inert: with one strong source + canvas boost
the 0/2/4 floor difference is subtle — needs a clearer demo in a big dark
stretch. SHADOWS: Paolo invites design thinking -> addendum filed.

=== GROUND SPOT-CHECK LESSON (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
Tool retired unjudged. Two metric flaws exposed: (1) wrap-err rewards FLAT
tiles -> S-tier was bland mush ("everything looks the same"); (2) CORNERS
unmeasured — the 4-copy junction point is its own failure mode ("don't have
good corners on each other"). Also: every interactive must state plainly WHAT
QUESTION each item answers. Re-scored with edges + corners + detail.

=== SPOT-CHECK v2 (Paolo 7/10/26): ALL 14 DOWN — "do better" ===
DIAGNOSIS FILED: (1) metric measured pixel-edge match; humans read PATTERN
continuity (grout/brick/crack lines) + BRIGHTNESS stepping from baked-in tile
vignettes that no crop fixes; (2) 96->44 Lanczos mushes pixel art. FIXES:
seam-saliency metric on the ASSEMBLED 2x2 (seam must be no louder than the
tile's own internal edges), vignette detrend before scoring, prefer exact 2:1
downscale (crop 88 -> 44) for crispness.

=== CLARIFICATION (Paolo 7/10/26, IMPORTANT) ===
Spot-check "all bad" verdicts = the SEAMS/corners were bad, NOT the tiles.
NO TILE was killed, demoted, or graveyarded from ground passes. Tiers in the
GROUND MASTER SET rank the SEAM-READINESS OF CLAUDE'S CURRENT CROP on each
tile — they are NOT tile-quality verdicts. A C-tier tile is a good tile whose
seam solution is unsolved. Only Paolo's explicit tile verdicts kill tiles.

=== QUILT-CUT VERDICTS (Paolo 7/10/26): Q0-Q4 ALL UP ===
SEAM METHOD VALIDATED + LOCKED. Pipeline law: per ground tile, compute BOTH
crop-only and quilt-cut; ship whichever has lower seam saliency; rigid patterns
that resist both stay flagged for period-align or purpose art. No blur ever.

=== SEAMLESS PROOF GALLERY VERDICTS (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
GOOD except 6: Cracked street #33 (1.04), Floor tiles(1) #17 (0.09!),
Rusted metal floor #12, Metal floor #25, Scrap wall/panels #14, Special
hazard #12. LESSONS PROPAGATED: (1) S ceiling tightened (borderline ~1.0
fails); (2) saliency was luminance-only — chroma seams invisible to it; now
per-channel; (3) manufactured regular patterns (metal/panel/hazard/grate)
break at PATTERN PHASE, not brightness — auto-classed PATTERN regardless of
saliency until period-aligned. Tiles alive; their seam solutions demoted.

=== PERIOD SOLVER STATUS (7/10/26, honest log) ===
Attempt 1 (1D autocorr): 3 rescued of 263. Attempt 2 (2D shift-match): 0 —
suspiciously fast, normalization gate likely buggy (filed for next solver
session). PATTERN tiles remain quarantined, unharmed, awaiting a real
period-alignment solve or purpose art. Cook continues per Continuous Cooking rule.

=== COOK 5 SELF-KILLED (7/10/26) ===
Prop silhouette "audit" flagged 100% of 3,694 props — meaning the heuristic was
misreading the packs' INTENTIONAL soft anti-aliased edges as junk. Shipping it
would have hardened every silhouette = art vandalism. Bank deleted, masters
never touched. LESSON: an audit needs a style baseline first; a 100% hit rate
means the auditor is wrong, not the art.

=== BRIDGE DIRECTION NOTE (Paolo 7/10/26) ===
All bridge tiles seen in the mega-session P-section run NORTH-SOUTH. Bridges
are DIRECTIONAL structures (like paths and doors): direction tags mandatory in
the future bridge category; E-W bridges = separate drawn art per NO-TRANSFORM
law, never rotated/flipped from N-S art.

=== HEURISTIC LESSONS LEDGER (7/10/26, cumulative) ===
SEMANTIC dimensions that heuristics CANNOT judge (Paolo eyes only):
1. Aesthetic classes (Atlantis) — v1 hit 8,673/8,674
2. Content identity (items, what-is-this) — concept groups suggest-only
3. Prop silhouette intent (anti-aliasing is style) — audit hit 100%, self-killed
4. Display footprint ("reads bigger than one tile") — hit 570/575, reverted
MEASURABLE dimensions where trained heuristics WORK: seam saliency (chroma),
corner junctions, deck continuity, base anchoring, transparency/ground-hug,
purity (purple/hot), family sorting at high confidence (calibrated 0.99).
LAW: 100% (or near-total) hit rate = the auditor is wrong. Revert, file, move.

ledger. Lesson: packs are the only trustworthy grouping (human-made).
Future misc sweeps ship PACK-PAGED.

=== DEMO-SOURCE LESSON (Paolo 7/13/26) ===
The two bake v12 sewer doors = Paolo DISLIKED ("dog shit, barely never wanna
see") -> near-never pool; demo needs approved replacements. LAW: factory
demos and proofs ALWAYS source from Paolo's highest-approval pool
(Great Sweep UPs), never from whatever is convenient.

=== DOOR STYLE VERDICT (Paolo 7/13/26): industrial #1 rolls up, ALL other doors swing ===
Factory full run: 27/27 approved doors, per-clip gates (residue + freeze) all pass.
Fire flicker factory v1 launched on approved light sources (pixel-law verified loops).

=== STREET GEN v0 VERDICT (Paolo 7/13/26): DOWN — premature, idea credited ===
Failures: raw footprints used (cars read 2x2, human-sized fire extinguisher —
scale_fix never applied in render path); no crosswalks; no middle lane;
toy street width. CANON FILED: realistic widths (~16 cells for 2+2 lanes,
possibly more), full street anatomy required. STREET GEN PARKED until vision
audit + scale application complete (Paolo steer: training before generating).
FIX SHIPPED: bohemia_prop_scale.js = mandatory scale choke point, tests green
(car 2x3 enforced, flagged items sub-cell, passthrough clean).

=== PAOLO STREET ROLE LABELS (7/13/26) — AUTHORITATIVE ===
LANE_DIV: cracked street #4/5/13/14/26. MEDIAN (fat, u-turns): #18-22.
CROSSWALK: #15-17. PLAIN: the rest. #23 diagonal retired ("not a fan").
Hazard pack: NOT street; #34-43 = sign faces -> POLE PRODUCTION queued
("you'll probably have to make that pole"). NO edge-line class in Vegas
anatomy. Claude's guessed classes fully replaced.

=== LINE COLOR LAW (Paolo 7/13/26) ===
Yellow/orange lines ALWAYS separate direction of traffic; white lines
separate same-direction lanes; orientation must run with the road axis.
Filed: BOHEMIA_ADDENDUM_LINE_COLOR_LAW_7_13_26.md; anatomy pool metadata
updated (color_class + line_axis per tile).

=== STREET FIX ROUND (Paolo 7/13/26) ===
Paolo caught: lines running wrong axis (uniform-rotation assumption), yellow
mixed into white divider rows, lane width wrong. FIXES: per-tile pixel
DETECTION of line axis + color (no assumptions); #26 excluded from LANE_DIV
(pixels yellow — Line Color Law conflict, Paolo to rule); LANE WIDTH LAW:
lanes = 2 cells; composed rows MACHINE-VERIFIED before ship (lane_div row:
white-only + EW runs PASS; median row: yellow-dominant + EW runs PASS).

=== VISION NAMING CORRECTION PASS (7/14/26, sleep cook) ===
Claude self-audit: sheets 2-4 banked names were MISALIGNED FABRICATIONS
(batch-positional naming against an assumed pack composition; the 10
'p_light_streetlamp' entries were literally SACKS AND CRATES). LESSON LOCKED:
names may only come from directly-seen name->image pairs keyed by the sheet
map (pack,idx); batch-positional naming is banned. Correction executed:
sheets 2-8 renamed per item from ground truth (328 final names), matrix and
queues rebuilt, LIGHT REGISTRY v2 shipped with real emitters (lantern sv#24
matching Paolo's own sweep comment, campstove, flashlight, campfires, fx
flame) and electric lights held PENDING Paolo's act-1 grid-power ruling.

=== HOUSE FACTORY v1 VERDICT (Paolo 7/14/26): ALL 24 DOWN — "really really bad" ===
Batch killed, approach retired. Diagnosis: naive tile-fill produced texture
rectangles, not architecture (flat roof fill, no ridge/eaves/corners, wrong
wall vocabulary, no silhouette). LESSON: assembly factories need PAOLO PART
ANATOMY first (proven workflow: street roles, door leaf markups). Fix lane:
HOUSE PART ROLES labeler over his approved building-scale pieces.

=== SEAM DIAGNOSIS CORRECTED (Paolo 7/14/26: "seams getting WORSE") ===
Claude was fixing SELF-wrap; the street's visible seams are CROSS-TILE
(different pool variants meeting). Blend/toroidal passes = blur bands, worse
in pixel art. REAL FIX: clean raw sources + FAMILY EDGE RING harmonization
(hard pixels) + canonical line stamped across line-class variants (rows
machine-verified identical). LESSON: pixel art seams die by construction
(shared edges), never by blur.

=== BLACK GRID REGRESSION (Paolo screenshot 7/14/26) ===
Root cause: source tiles carry baked dark outlines; proven GROUND_SEAMLESS
set had cropped inside them; Claude regressed by rebuilding pools "from
clean raws" (raws are NOT clean). LAW: processed seamless banks are the
source of truth; never rebuild from raw masters. Line tiles now frame-shaved
on the HD before any other processing.

=== LIGHT PHILOSOPHY LAW (Paolo 7/14/26) ===
"Everything can be touched by light, nothing is above light." Per-sprite
tinting BANNED (it is how sprites escape the light). Architecture forever:
full-bright scene pass -> whole-frame lightmap multiply -> emissives only
above darkness. Filed: BOHEMIA_ADDENDUM_LIGHT_PHILOSOPHY_7_14_26.md.
Machine-verified in LIVE SLICE V2: door + walker draw BEFORE the multiply,
only flames after.

=== GAME TIME BUG (Paolo 7/14/26: walked all blocks, no time passed) ===
Root cause: tryStep never RETURNED success; the world-advance wrapper saw
undefined and never ticked TURN. LESSON LOCKED: static string checks are not
behavior — every interactive with game logic now gets a HEADLESS BEHAVIORAL
GATE (stubbed DOM, simulated inputs, asserted world state) before shipping.
Fixed + behaviorally verified: 40 steps -> world beats advance, NPCs walk,
sun crawls; FREE RUN regression green.

=== TERRAIN v1 GRAVEYARD (Paolo 7/14/26: "desert and mountains both look
like shit — tiles I did not agree with in placement, seams all fucked") ===
POST-MORTEM, two root causes:
1. SEAMS: the GROUND_SEAMLESS bank STORES each tile's finished processed
   pixels (b64 field). Terrain v1 ignored them and re-cut HD raws with
   half-applied crop metadata = destroyed the 7/10 pipeline's work.
   LESSON LOCKED: processed banks are the SOURCE OF TRUTH — never re-derive
   from raws when finished pixels exist.
2. PLACEMENT: pools were machine-picked; Paolo never approved those tiles
   for terrain duty. LESSON: pool MEMBERSHIP is a Paolo verdict, not a
   heuristic. Terrain pools now come only from BOHEMIA_TERRAIN_PICKER
   exports.
Terrain blocks stay in the gallery as DOWN reference until picker-driven v2.

### FILE: BOHEMIA_SEWER_DEMO_MAP_SPEC_7_10_26.txt
### MD5: 4ca3d642266e53930b4934d8f1848096  |  2.9 KB
==============================================================================

BOHEMIA SEWER DEMO MAP — LAYOUT SPEC (7/10/26)
exported 2026-07-11T00:27:51.985026+00:00
grid: 14 wide x 30 tall, top-down, vertical descent
preview: BOHEMIA_SEWER_DEMO_MAP.png
============================================================
ZONES (top -> bottom = the descent):
  rows 0-6   WASH — wide light concrete flood channel, player START (green) top-center,
             a water trickle down the center. Open, bright, safe-feeling.
  rows 7-9   TRANSITION — funnels from full-width wash to a ~4-wide sewer mouth.
  rows 10-24 SEWER — winding 4-6 wide dark tunnel, water channel threads the center,
             TWO side chambers (left ~14-17, right ~19-22) for enemy ambush pockets.
  rows 25-29 HATCH ROOM — wide dark dead-end chamber. NETWORK HATCH (orange ring) center.

TILE POOLS (all point to HD masters, see sewer_pools):
  WASH  = light opaque concrete (dry channel)
  SEWER = dark stone/brick/cobble (wet tunnel)
  WATER = water/toxic/sewage channel tiles

CELL COUNTS: sewer=141, void=172, wash=87, water=20

DESIGN INTENT:
  - Brightness DROPS as you descend (wash mean ~87 -> sewer mean ~19). Dread builds by light.
  - Water channel is the through-line guiding player downward toward the hatch.
  - Side chambers = where cybernetic homeless ambush from (barely-visible in the dark).
  - Hatch = the reveal: Network stormwater-siphon build below.

PROC NOTE: this is a hand-bounded slice for the DEMO. Full game proc-gens these zones;
the demo ships THIS shape so it's tuned and repeatable. Tunnel winding + chamber
placement can be re-seeded but the wash->sewer->hatch spine stays fixed.

PENDING PAOLO: enemy behavior (rush vs throw), homeless art tell, hatch/siphon-build look.

=== UPDATE 7/10/26 — PURPLE RESERVATION LAW (Paolo, LOCKED) ===
- Purple is RESERVED for the hatch/door into the Network build. ONLY purple in the demo.
- All purple/violet tiles purged from wash/sewer/water pools (per-pixel check, zero tolerance).
- Hatch redrawn in amalgam purple (glint 196,84,160 / subdermal 122,42,96 family).
- Verified: purple pixels exist ONLY in the hatch cells (y693-737, x173-217). Law enforced pixel-perfect.
- SKIN: world-graded SKIN_TONES_WORLD APPROVED by Paolo ("fantastic"). Homeless grime ramps approved direction.
- Cyber subdermal magenta tell: PENDING Paolo ruling under the purple law (Amalgamation-agent exception or kill).

=== UPDATE 7/10/26 — NO VOLCANO TILES (Paolo, LOCKED) ===
- No lava/volcano-reading tiles in the demo. Per-pixel hot-glow check (r>140, r>>b, emissive)
  run on every pool tile; 5 killed (1 sewer, 3 cracked-concrete wash, 1 toxic water).
- Final map verified: ZERO lava-hot pixels. Purple still hatch-only.
- Pools after purity passes: wash 4, sewer 7, water 5. All tiles pass purple AND lava checks.
  (final purity pass: 2 more ember-pixel water tiles killed. FINAL VERIFY: 0 lava-hot px,
   purple hatch-only. pools: wash 4, sewer 7, water 3.)
